result:
`make` in `wpa_supplicant/` builds cleanly (exit 0). Summary of changes:

- `src/utils/os.h`: `os_get_time` now takes `(struct os_time *t, int clock_source)`.
- `src/utils/os_unix.c`: definition updated to accept `clock_source` (unused, behavior unchanged — `clock_source==0` and all other values behave identically, matching current behavior).
- `src/utils/os_win32.c`, `src/utils/os_none.c`, `src/utils/os_internal.c`: signatures updated to match the new header for repo-wide consistency (also used by other OS ports).
- All call sites across the repo (wpa_supplicant, hostapd/AP, EAP, TLS, RADIUS, MACsec, crypto, etc.) updated to pass `0` as the new argument.
